title: ADBPG Memory CLI Per-Agent Configuration
description: Per-agent configuration file schema for adbpg-mem CLI tool (~/.adbpg-mem/agents/<agent_id>.json). Stores per-agent isolation state set by `adbpg-mem agent-config set`. Distinct from the system-level config at ~/.adbpg-mem/config.json.

isolation_agent.description: Whether this agent's memories are isolated by agent_id (CLI add/search will inject -a)

isolation_run_mode.description: Run/session isolation mode: off=no run isolation; manual=user names each session; auto=auto-generated run_id (YYYY-MM-DD-HHMMSS); tag=use --metadata tag instead of -r

current_run_id.description: Currently active run_id when isolation_run_mode is manual or auto
